title: retama bovei
intro: Retama bovei, also known as Retama, is a flowering plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Retama bovei include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Retama bovei often involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from the leaves and flowers, which are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
